main.description: Get detailed profile views of multiple actors, hydrating social proof (known followers) only for a subset of them. Intended for internal service-to-service use.

viewer.description: DID of the account on whose behalf the request is made (not included for public/unauthenticated requests). Used for viewer-relative state, including social proof.

socialProof.description: DIDs to hydrate social proof (known followers) for. DIDs not also present in `dids` are ignored.
